maintainer_access: maintainer can administer; required checks still apply to pushes
notes: This file documents the desired branch protection state for the public main branch.
Apply it through GitHub Settings -> Branches or through a ruleset matching this shape.
Required status checks are selected from workflows that run on every pull request to main.
Path-filtered or scheduled-only jobs are intentionally not required here because GitHub branch protection waits for required checks even when a workflow is not triggered.
